origin: User-found gap (2026-06-03): the chat retriever does vector search + small-to-big parent merge but never traverses LINKS_TO — the link graph (1.72M edges) is unused at query time, despite the profile configuring it and LIR-008's acceptance claiming '1-hop links-to expansion'.
summary: Make retrieval graph-aware: implement the bounded, query-relevant 1-hop LINKS_TO expansion the profile already configures (and LIR-008 claimed but never delivered). Secondary: the semantic query-cache holds stale pre-refactor entries that interrupt/short-circuit clean testing.
answers_question: Does the current (closed) work plan cover this? NO — LIR-008 listed it as acceptance but did not implement it; work unit 20 is complete with no pending task delivering it. A new task set is required (this work unit).
